infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: GeoField uses your location while the app is open to attach GPS coordinates to field samples and measurements.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: GeoField needs your location to tag field samples with GPS coordinates.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: GeoField uses your location while the app is open to attach GPS coordinates to field samples and measurements.

plugins.photosPermission: GeoField needs access to your photos to attach images to field samples.
plugins.cameraPermission: GeoField needs access to your camera to photograph and record field samples.
plugins.microphonePermission: GeoField needs microphone access to record sample videos.
